description: Structural alignment of Kynde Blade locations to Piers Plowman text versions (A/B/C) and narrative phases (Visio / Vita). Spine keys reference campaign_spine.json.

A.label: A-text
A.notes: Earlier witness; shorter arc. Use for optional A-lane content only unless canon shifts.

B.label: B-text
B.notes: Default for player-facing passus labels and Godot slice spine.

C.label: C-text
C.notes: Revised witness; political and lexical shifts. Future branch via piers_text_edition in save.

visio.label: Visio — fair field, tower, sins, pilgrimage imagery

vita_dowel.label: Vita — Do-Wel (Dowel) quest
vita_dowel.notes: Kynde Blade uses quest_do_wel / depths / years_pass / field_of_grace ordering.

vita_dobet.label: Vita — Do-Bet (placeholder)
vita_dobet.notes: Reserve for expanded Vision II+ when beats are authored.

vita_dobest.label: Vita — Do-Best (placeholder)
vita_dobest.notes: Reserve for expanded Vision II+ when beats are authored.
